subject: Update to Common
commit_message:
Update to Common

Refined ParameterGroup by adding range capability.

Issue-ID: MODELING-104

Change-Id: I588c2c8ba95c4b9460998440a3a4f0e88cfac86c
Signed-off-by: Kevin Scaggs <ks0567@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

comment:
1) regarding the assumption of one unit for a particular parameter: I think this is acceptable for now, but may be relaxed in the future, i.e., change cardinality to 1..N to cover more use cases, for example, second/minute/hour/day for time (or 0..N? if no units are required)
2) could rangeStep be omitted (by default) if the step is 1?

Patch Set 1: Verified+1 Code-Review+2

Hi Kevin, 4 questions:1. How is the attribute value in ParameterSpecValue used with attributes valueFrom and valueTo? 2. Association DynamicParmSpecValueInstantiatedAsDynamicParmValue in ParameterSpecValue side is 0...1,does this mean a ParameterValue can be independent with a ParameterSpecValue? If so, where can this value come from? 3.Should association ValueGroupHasParameter called ParmGroupHasParameter? 4. DesignEntityFurtherDefinedByParmGroup in DesignEntity side now is 0..*,I think 0 means a ParameterGroup can independently exist without associated with any DesignEntity, shouldn't it be 1..*?
Change has been successfully merged by Chuyi Guo
